center.label: Research
center.description: Research topics at the intersection of graphs, climate, finance, insurance and AI.

nodes.label: Temporal Graph Neural Networks
nodes.description: PhD focus for spatio-temporal clustering.
details: Dual PhD in Mathematics and Economics at Universite Paris-Dauphine.
Research topic from the CV: Temporal Graph Neural Networks for spatio-temporal clustering.
Connects graph learning, representation learning and spatial risk analysis.

nodes.label: Climate Risk
nodes.description: Climate vulnerability, insured losses and non-stationary risk.
details: Professional work includes climate-risk data and predictive analytics for startups and SMEs.
Flood modelling mission translated hazard maps into financial losses on insured assets.
Research direction links climate vulnerability, prevention and insurance protection gaps.

nodes.label: NLP for Insurance
nodes.description: Text and language use cases for the insurance industry.
details: Designed NLP use cases for the insurance industry at Nexialog Consulting R&D.
CV coursework includes NLP during the Master Data Science for Economics.
Useful for claims documents, underwriting material, contracts and regulatory analysis.

nodes.label: Economic Scenarios
nodes.description: Market-consistent and real-world scenarios for actuarial and financial modelling.
details: Contributed to a Risk-Neutral Economic Scenario Generator for market-consistent valuation.
Developed a Real World Economic Scenario Generator during the actuarial internship.
Connected to Solvency II, ORSA, IFRS 17 and internal model applications.

nodes.label: Spatio-temporal Modelling
nodes.description: Models for data evolving across both space and time.
details: Used in customer analytics: temporal clustering, behavioral pattern detection, forecasting and segmentation.
Flood modelling work combined topographic data, interpolation, smoothing and graph propagation.
Central to the PhD direction on spatio-temporal clustering.

nodes.label: Quantum / Blockchain / Finance
nodes.description: Emerging computational methods connected to finance and economics.
details: CV coursework includes Blockchain Economics.
Programming skills include Solidity.
The site can later expand this node toward quantum feature maps and quantum machine learning work.

nodes.label: Flood Risk Mission
nodes.description: R&D mission for a major European insurer, Jul 2025 - Sept 2025.
details: Reconstructed continuous flood surfaces from TRI regulatory maps with RGE ALTI / LiDAR data.
Designed interpolation, smoothing and graph-based extrapolation methods.
Converted hazard maps into financial losses through exposure-level impact modelling.
